name: sc-js
description: Capability-based JavaScript rules: detects runtime (web/desktop), framework (Nuxt/Vue/Alpine/Vite/Astro), ORMs and capabilities (state, icons, code-splitting, images, SSR, etc.) then installs matching coding rules. Perf pivots for web-optimize, data pivots for data-optimize. Use sniff on existing projects, setup for fresh installs.
